description: This chart presents the prediction performance of solid solution strengthening increment Δσ<sub>sss</sub> (unit: MPa) for Fe-C-Cr-Mn-Si steels under ten-fold cross validation, with {δ<sub>Ec</sub>, D, G} as input features of the machine learning model. The x-axis represents experimental Δσ<sub>sss</sub> values, the y-axis represents predicted Δσ<sub>sss</sub> values, both ranging from 1200 MPa to 1800 MPa. Blue scattered points denote all test samples, the blue dashed line is the ideal 1:1 guide line for perfect prediction. The color of scattered points corresponds to prediction error, ranging from 0.60 to 29.90. The model achieves an RMSE of 0.31 and R<sup>2</sup> of 0.89, indicating high consistency between predicted and experimental Δσ<sub>sss</sub> values. This figure confirms the adopted machine learning model has high accuracy for solid solution strengthening prediction of Fe-C-Cr-Mn-Si steels, supporting its application in property-oriented design of this steel system.
